title: No Flora
description: Removes the textures of blocks of flowers, grass, etc.
body:
![banner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3553c5147087adfdfcc5a2f9e04a731a953d92d9.png)

[![discord-singular](https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/@intergrav/devins-badges@3/assets/cozy/social/discord-singular_vector.svg)](https://dsc.gg/spectrr3)
[![modrinth-gallery](https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/@intergrav/devins-badges@3/assets/cozy/documentation/modrinth-gallery_vector.svg)](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/no-flora/gallery)

Removes the textures of blocks of flowers, grass, mushrooms.
Full list:
- azure_bluet.png
- brown_mushroom.png
- cornflower.png
- dandelion.png
- dead_bush.png
- fern.png
- large_fern_bottom.png
- large_fern_top.png
- lily_of_the_valley.png
- oxeye_daisy.png
- pink_petals.png
- poppy.png
- red_mushroom.png
- short_grass.png
- tall_grass_bottom.png
- tall_grass_top.png
### Information:
Pack version 1.15-26.1 Snaphsot 11 (but in version lower 1.20 resource pack it will be displayed as "Made for an oder version of Minecraft", I am aware of this, but I can't do anything.)
